famous quote:
The best way to become a billionaire is to help a billion people.
-Peter Diamandis
Interview Text:
Claudia:

I saw Claudia in the returning student's orientation class for my seminary. She asked me if I had been to the mountains lately. I said yes, I had just been to a cabin in North Georgia for a bachelor party a few weeks before. I asked her how she knew. 

She said something like, "I can sense something on you." I asked her, "How do you tap into that sort of information?" I don't know why God would have prompted her to ask me that, except if it is what would lead us into our conversation on hearing from God.

I asked, "Are you intuitive?" She said, "No, I'm a connector."

I asked, "Do you mean you get information like that by observing nuanced indicators in people's appearance?"
She said no, "It's from an external communication, not an internal sense. And not from my observations of others." And then she gestured upward.

I asked, "Is there a part of the body that you get the sensation in?"

She said assuredly that it is in the head. She held her hand flat under her chin to indicate it happens above there. 

I asked how she has gotten good at recognizing that type of communication.

She said, "By practicing it through your every-day life." 

I asked, "Like using everyday life as your control experiment?"
"Yes, by first calming your mind so you can hear, then asking, and then acting on the little messages you recieve. You have to be asking and be open to it. And then you recognize what is the voice and what isn't by how it bears fruit. Like even if it's helping an aging parent; it doesn't have to be something miraculous."

She continued, "It's an adjustment. You may not want to do it, but this is something that is good to do to help align the greater order that God wants. But when God asks you to do it, you have to get into the habit of obedience. And you should not use the information for harm. You just get good at recognizing it by testing all that out."

"Yes, it's taken years and years to really get good at recognizing it. But you have to realize that sometimes acting on the instructions does not always reap the benefit you expected. The instructions may take a different direction. But that isn't because you didn't hear correctly, or you didn't obey. It may be because of other people's free will. 

She also added, "But you must pray for protection first, before you entertain any of that. Especially in the early stages. Just because opening yourself could be opening yourself to harmful or malicious enemies."
Music Video Instructions: Pray this prayer with Chris Martin and friends.
